hero.description: Your toolkit to stop configuring and start innovating. Securely build, deploy, and scale the best experiences.

01.title: Instant Deployment
01.description: Push to production in seconds. Our edge network ensures your applications load instantly, anywhere in the world.

02.title: AI-Native Workflows
02.description: Build intelligent applications with built-in AI capabilities. From inference to training, everything scales automatically.

03.title: Real-time Collaboration
03.description: Work together seamlessly. Live preview, instant feedback, and version control that actually makes sense.

04.title: Enterprise Security
04.description: Bank-grade encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and granular access controls. Your data stays yours.

1.title: Connect your tools
1.description: Integrate with your existing stack in minutes. We support 200+ data sources out of the box.

2.title: Build your workflow
2.description: Design powerful automations with our visual builder or write code directly.

3.title: Ship to production
3.description: Deploy globally with zero configuration. Your app goes live in under 30 seconds.

infrastructure.title: Global by
infrastructure.description: Deploy once, run everywhere. Our edge network spans 17 data centers across 6 continents, delivering sub-50ms latency to 99% of the world.

integrations.title: Works with your
integrations.description: Connect to 200+ services instantly. If you can name it, we integrate with it.

security.title: Trust is
security.description: Enterprise-grade security isn't optional. It's built into every layer of our platform, from infrastructure to application.
security.soc2Desc: Independently audited security controls with continuous monitoring.
security.encryptionDesc: AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit.
security.zeroTrustDesc: Every request is authenticated and authorized. No exceptions.
security.complianceDesc: Full compliance with data protection and healthcare regulations.

developers.title: Built by devs.
developers.description: A thoughtfully designed SDK that gets out of your way. Ship faster with intuitive APIs and exceptional documentation.

typescript.title: TypeScript native
typescript.description: Full type safety with auto-generated types.

edge.title: Edge-ready
edge.description: Runs anywhere: Node, Deno, Bun, browsers.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.footer: All plans include automatic updates, HTTPS, and DDoS protection. {{compare}}

cta.title: Ready to build
cta.description: Join thousands of teams shipping faster with Optimus. Start free, scale infinitely.

footer.description: The platform for teams who ship. Build, deploy, and scale with unprecedented velocity.
